services.title: Cyber Café & Digital Portals
services.short: High-speed browsing, exam & portal registrations, result checking and full document processing.
services.intro: Comfortable workstations and fast internet for everything you need to get done online.

bullets.heading: High-Speed Internet Access
bullets.detail: Comfortable workstations for browsing, research, and downloads.

bullets.heading: Exam & Portal Registrations
bullets.detail: Hassle-free registration for JAMB, WAEC, NECO, and other online recruitment/admission portals.

bullets.heading: Result Checking
bullets.detail: Quick checking and printing of examination results.

bullets.heading: Document Processing
bullets.detail: Professional typing, scanning, photocopying, laminating, and spiral binding.

image.alt: People browsing the internet at computer workstations

services.whatsappMessage: Hi Elmusteene! I need help with browsing, an exam/portal registration or document processing.

services.title: Computer Repairs & Maintenance
services.short: Hardware fixes, software troubleshooting and speed-boosting upgrades for laptops and desktops.
services.intro: Your devices are handled by skilled repair professionals — from cracked screens to slow systems.

bullets.heading: Hardware Fixes
bullets.detail: Laptop/Desktop screen replacements, battery swaps, keyboard repairs, and charging port fixes.

bullets.heading: Software Troubleshooting
bullets.detail: Operating system installation (Windows/Mac), virus removal, and essential software setup.

bullets.heading: System Upgrades
bullets.detail: Speed up slow computers with RAM upgrades and Solid State Drive (SSD) installations.

image.alt: Precision computer repair toolkit with screwdriver bits, tweezers and pry tools

bullets.detail: Mice, Keyboards, and Laptop Chargers/Power Adapters.
